creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The port is failing to compile on 10.4 with this error:

[ 60%] Building CXX object CMakeFiles/rocksdb.dir/util/crc32c.cc.o
In file included from /wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/cockroach/work/cockroach-v1.1.6/src/github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/c-deps/rocksdb/util/crc32c.cc:19:
/usr/include/clang/3.4.1/nmmintrin.h:28:2: error: "SSE4.2 instruction set not enabled"
#error "SSE4.2 instruction set not enabled"
 ^
[ 60%] Building CXX object CMakeFiles/rocksdb.dir/util/delete_scheduler.cc.o
[ 63%] Building CXX object CMakeFiles/rocksdb.dir/util/dynamic_bloom.cc.o
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/cockroach/work/cockroach-v1.1.6/src/github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/c-deps/rocksdb/util/crc32c.cc:319:16: error: unknown attribute 'target' ignored [-Werror,-Wattributes]
__attribute__((target("sse4.2")))
               ^
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/cockroach/work/cockroach-v1.1.6/src/github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/c-deps/rocksdb/util/crc32c.cc:322:8: error: use of undeclared identifier '_mm_crc32_u64'
  *l = _mm_crc32_u64(*l, LE_LOAD64(*p));
       ^
/wrkdirs/usr/ports/databases/cockroach/work/cockroach-v1.1.6/src/github.com/cockroachdb/cockroach/c-deps/rocksdb/util/crc32c.cc:393:25: error: unknown attribute 'target' ignored [-Werror,-Wattributes]
template __attribute__((target("sse4.2")))
                        ^
4 errors generated.
gmake[5]: *** [CMakeFiles/rocksdb.dir/build.make:3063: CMakeFiles/rocksdb.dir/util/crc32c.cc.o] Error 1
gmake[5]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....



I tried forcing it to use a newer clang on 10.4 using USES=compiler, but It looks like the port is actually ignoring the CC and CXX environments passed by the port system, and insists using bare cc/cxx.

Could you please investigate making the port respect CC and CXX? It is actually mandatory for ports to respect those.
